name: Speech to Speech
description: Realtime speech-to-speech over Anvil Serving or user-owned OpenAI-compatible STT, LLM, and TTS endpoints

baseUrl.description: Realtime backend HTTP or WebSocket base URL; /v1/realtime is appended when needed.

apiKey.description: Optional bearer token or secret reference for non-loopback realtime endpoints.

sttApiKey.description: Optional bearer token or secret reference for the STT endpoint.

llmBaseUrl.description: OpenAI-compatible Chat Completions HTTP base URL.

llmApiKey.description: Optional bearer token or secret reference for the LLM endpoint.

ttsApiKey.description: Optional bearer token or secret reference for the TTS endpoint.

ttsSampleRateHz.description: TTS PCM response sample rate; defaults to 24000.

requestTimeoutMs.description: Per-stage upstream request deadline in milliseconds; defaults to 60000.
